scope_note: QA Pyth-3 Spirituality cert [375]. Primary source: Iverson & Elkins (2006) Pythagorean Arithmetic Vol III Ch.6 pp.28-36. (C1) 7 Myriads: subsound/music/ultrasound/matter/light/metaphysical/creative; 3+1+3=7; 7 mod 24=7; 7 first prime not dividing 360. (C2) Light Myriad: 7 colors 4 primary (red/yellow/green/blue) 3 secondary; Music Myriad: 4 bugle notes C/F/A/C; both have 4 primary=QA tuple size. (C3) Bugle notes 3:4:5:6 map to QA tuple b=3 e=1 diff=4=F apex=5=A; upper C=6=2*3 octave ratio 2:1; 3*3+4*4=5*5. (C4) 7 octaves * 7 primary=49=7*7; 49 mod 24=1 Singularity class. (C5) Episode 3: mother died 61, 37 years elapsed, 61+37=98=2*7*7; 61 mod 24=13; 37 mod 24=13; 98 mod 24=2; 70 mod 24=22. DOI: primary text, no external DOI.
